summary: Subtask 001 deliverable (site-conventions.md, 609 lines) is comprehensive, well-structured, and verified accurate against actual site files. All 6 acceptance criteria met. Cross-checked front matter examples for all 5 collections, sidebar navigation order, category hyphen-replacement logic, collection permalink config, and asset path conventions — all match source files exactly. Minor note: Codex created .codex/state.json outside subtask dir (codex control file, not a business file — acceptable). No blocking issues.
evidence: AC1 PASS: All 5 collections (_posts, _blogs, _figs, _shots, _vlogs) documented with real front matter examples verified against source files

AC2 PASS: Naming conventions (YYYY-MM-DD-Title-With-Hyphens.md), category patterns (hyphen-separated, space-separated tokens in YAML), and layout assignments (post/blog/fig/shot/vlog) all documented accurately
AC3 PASS: Sidebar navigation order (Home, Notes, Shots, Gallery, Publication, About) verified against _includes/sidebar.html; social links data flow documented correctly
AC4 PASS: Inline HTML title styling convention (...) documented with 5 example files listed
AC5 PASS: Image asset paths documented — _figs→public/fig_post/<folder>/, _shots→public/shots/<YYYY-MM-DD-slug>/, vlogs use Bilibili iframe — all verified against source files
AC6 PASS: Section 9 provides 5 explicit cross-checks with source file references; reviewer independently verified 6+ conventions against actual files
issues_found: MINOR: Codex created .codex/state.json and modified .codex/subtask/plan.json outside the subtask output directory — these are codex control files, not business files, so this is acceptable but noted
MINOR: Subtask input listed 14 includes but repo has 15 — Codex correctly documented the actual count (15) and noted the discrepancy

acceptance_check.criterion: Reference document covers all 5 content collections with accurate front matter field listings
Reference includes exact naming conventions, category patterns, and layout assignments
Reference documents the site navigation structure accurately
Reference captures the inline HTML title styling convention
Reference includes image asset path conventions for each collection
All information is verified against actual site files — no fabricated details

stop_conditions: Subtask 002 validation report is generated at .codex/subtask/002_validate-site-integrity/validation-report.md
All content files have been checked for YAML front matter validity
Layout reference integrity has been verified
Jekyll build has been attempted and results documented
No site files have been modified (read-only validation)
